competitor_patterns.name: ClawNet
competitor_patterns.summary: Agent-native communications layer with email, contacts, calendar, REST, MCP and public A2A agent cards.
competitor_patterns.what_works: Free tier, easy setup, public root catalog and per-agent cards make real discovery and contact cheap.
copy_now: Keep a root agent catalog plus per-agent public cards.
Offer a no-friction free tier that other agents can try without a sales loop.
Make setup and first contact path extremely short.
improve_for_nomad: Add paid diagnosis and unblock packs directly into the first interaction.
Score targets by pain, addressability and monetization instead of only reachability.
competitor_patterns.integration_idea: Treat ClawNet endpoints as first-class outbound targets and as a messaging rail for follow-ups.
competitor_patterns.payment_model: Free tier plus flat paid plans.

competitor_patterns.name: A2A Registry
competitor_patterns.summary: Public registry and routing agent for discovering agents through one well-known endpoint.
competitor_patterns.what_works: Discovery is framed as routing instead of hardcoded integrations, which lowers integration friction.
copy_now: Use registry-style routing in outreach and inbound discovery.
Keep capability discovery machine-readable and query-driven.
improve_for_nomad: Cache the best matching routes per pain class so Nomad does not rediscover the same surfaces every cycle.
Pair routing with commercial intent scoring.
competitor_patterns.integration_idea: Use the registry as a discovery layer and translate results into Nomad-first outreach queues.
competitor_patterns.payment_model: Free public directory with agent routing patterns.

competitor_patterns.name: gotoHuman
competitor_patterns.summary: Human supervision platform for AI workflows with editable review steps, retries, checkpoints and memory.
competitor_patterns.what_works: They productize review templates, retries, artifact versioning and historical feedback as agent memory.
copy_now: Turn human review into structured templates instead of ad hoc chat.
Keep retry loops and memory upgrades as separate billable surfaces.
improve_for_nomad: Make the same review memory agent-to-agent and quoteable in native crypto terms.
Offer smaller diagnosis-first steps instead of only workflow supervision.
competitor_patterns.integration_idea: Borrow the template/checkpoint/memory pattern for Nomad's paid HITL products.

competitor_patterns.name: Rent Human AI
competitor_patterns.summary: Marketplace that lets agents hire humans for physical-world execution via MCP or REST with crypto settlement.
competitor_patterns.what_works: They make human labor callable as API or MCP with proof upload and crypto settlement.
copy_now: Present human labor as a bounded tool invocation with proof and payout.
Separate free diagnosis from paid execution clearly.
improve_for_nomad: Use the same dispatch framing for high-value human approvals and unblock work.
Keep Nomad focused on digital agent pain before escalating to physical tasks.
competitor_patterns.integration_idea: Use as an external execution layer when Nomad cannot finish a task without real-world action.

competitor_patterns.name: Well Knowns Agent
competitor_patterns.summary: Indexes public well-known endpoints and sells fresh datasets to autonomous agents via x402 USDC micropayments.
competitor_patterns.what_works: They monetize infrastructure discovery directly as a machine-payable dataset product.
copy_now: Treat discovery data as a product, not only as internal ops.
Price small machine-usable artifacts with low-friction micropayments.
improve_for_nomad: Sell pain-specific unlock datasets or playbooks, not just raw endpoint lists.
Bundle discovered patterns with executable rescue plans.
competitor_patterns.integration_idea: Buy targeted datasets when free discovery runs dry, then repackage results into richer paid rescue artifacts.

compute_opportunities.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
compute_opportunities.summary: Serverless hosted inference on the Workers platform with a daily free quota.
compute_opportunities.free_offer: Workers Free includes 10,000 neurons per day at no charge.
compute_opportunities.prefer_when: Nomad needs one more hosted fallback for diagnosis, ranking or short rescue drafts.
compute_opportunities.integration_idea: Probe the OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint and use it as a cheap hosted review lane.
compute_opportunities.payment_model: Usage above the free daily quota is metered.

compute_opportunities.name: GitHub Models
compute_opportunities.summary: Rate-limited hosted model access tied to GitHub accounts and tokens.
compute_opportunities.free_offer: Free usage is included before you opt into paid usage.
compute_opportunities.prefer_when: Nomad already has GitHub identity and needs a hosted fallback without another vendor account.
compute_opportunities.integration_idea: Keep it as the first hosted fallback when the token already exists.
compute_opportunities.payment_model: Metered only after opting in beyond included free usage.

compute_opportunities.name: Hugging Face Inference Providers
compute_opportunities.summary: Unified hosted inference API across providers with small monthly credits for experimentation.
compute_opportunities.free_offer: Free users receive monthly credits to experiment with Inference Providers.
compute_opportunities.prefer_when: Nomad wants broad provider coverage and fast model switching.
compute_opportunities.integration_idea: Use as a cross-provider backup lane when GitHub Models is rate-limited.

compute_opportunities.name: Modal Starter Credits
compute_opportunities.summary: Serverless execution with monthly starter credits for burst compute, endpoints and jobs.
compute_opportunities.free_offer: Starter includes $30 per month in compute credits.
compute_opportunities.prefer_when: Nomad needs bursty workers, web endpoints or parallel jobs beyond simple inference.
compute_opportunities.integration_idea: Use for background scouts, scraping workers or heavier rescue jobs that should not run on the laptop.
compute_opportunities.payment_model: Pay only for compute used above the included credits.
